item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/15/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/15/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Seasonal & Holiday and family friends.

item.title: Archery 101 - 06/16/2026 10:00am EDT to 06/16/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 3362 Infirmary Rd, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Linda Rose to learn the basics of archery and then try to hit the target.  All supplies provided.  Ages 10 years and older.  Limited registration. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Archery 101 on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Classes/Workshops and ages 10 and older.

item.title: Gardening and Grazing - Seneca Conservation District - 06/16/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/16/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca Conservation District for a hands-on activity of gardening and grazing. Please call Allen Eiry Center to sign up (419) 448-9774.
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Gardening and Grazing - Seneca Conservation District on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Parks & Rec.

item.title: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! - 06/16/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/16/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will offer a special summer edition of “Teen Tuesday” on Tuesdays, June 2, 9, 16, 23, and 30 from 2:00 p.m. to 3:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Teens entering grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly hangout featuring games, snacks, crafts and more. Part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story.” For more information, log onto http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Kids & Family.

item.title: Stunt Dog Show with Team Zoom - 06/16/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/16/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host Team Zoom Canine Entertainment for a stunt dog show on Tuesday, June 16 at 6:00 p.m. at the East Green Amphitheater. This high energy stunt dog show features rescue dog comedians who bring the laughs while performing amazing feats of agility. This program is fun for the whole family and is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, call 419-447-3751 or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Stunt Dog Show with Team Zoom on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include stunt dog show and team zoom.

item.title: "Colored Pencil Crushed Can" Tuesday, June 16, 2026 6pm-9pm #06162601 - 06/16/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/16/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA In this class you will use colored pencils to create a 5"x7" drawing of a crushed can, learning about strokes and blending techniques. All supplies are provided. Preregistration is required by Saturday June 13. Minimum class size is 3 people. The cost is $45 for TAG members & $55 for non-members. Contact Mike Fink (813-695-0506), or TAG (419-443-0478), or tiffinartguild@att.net with questions. You can also stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Colored Pencil Crushed Can" Tuesday, June 16, 2026 6pm-9pm #06162601 on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include drawing techniques and minimum class size.

item.title: Paintings Gone Prehistoric - 06/17/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/17/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Tiffin-Seneca Public Library for “Paintings Gone Prehistoric,” a creative event for teens entering grades six through twelve on Wednesday, June 17, from 2:00 to 3:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Participants will have the opportunity to give classic paintings a prehistoric twist by incorporating dinosaurs, volcanoes, meteors, and other imaginative elements. All craft supplies will be provided. This event is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program theme, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, call 419-447-3751 or visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Paintings Gone Prehistoric on Jun 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Seasonal & Holiday and craft supplies.

item.title: Ribbon Cutting | Pets in Balance - 06/17/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/17/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 560 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca Regional Chamber & Development Ambassadors as they celebrate the grand opening of Pets in Balance with a ribbon cutting ceremony on Wednesday, June 17 at 4PM. The clinic is located at 560 Miami Street in Tiffin. Pets in Balance is a specialized veterinary clinic dedicated to helping pets achieve greater comfort, mobility, and overall wellness through acupuncture and spinal care. Led by Dr. Amber Stover, a licensed veterinarian with more than 30 years of experience, the practice focuses on holistic therapies designed to address the root causes of pain and imbalance in pets. Dr. Stover is one of only a few veterinarians in Ohio licensed to provide veterinary acupuncture. After decades of practicing traditional veterinary medicine, including more than 18 years serving local pets through a respected house-call practice, Dr. Stover opened Pets in Balance to offer personalized, natural treatment options for cats and dogs experiencing mobility challenges, discomfort, anxiety, or age-related changes. By combining veterinary acupuncture and spinal care, Pets in Balance helps support the body's natural healing processes while improving comfort, alignment, and quality of life. These gentle therapies have been shown to help reduce pain, improve mobility, and promote overall well-being for pets of all ages. Community members, pet owners, and supporters are invited to attend the ribbon cutting ceremony, tour the clinic, meet Dr. Stover, and learn more about the innovative services available at Pets in Balance. Join us in welcoming this unique addition to Tiffin's business community and celebrating a new resource for pet health and wellness in Northwest Ohio.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ribbon Cutting | Pets in Balance on Jun 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include acupuncture and age-related changes.

item.title: Film Fusion: Adult Interactive Movie Night - 06/17/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/17/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will a host “Film Fusion,” an adult interactive movie night, on Wednesday, June 17 from 6:00 to 8:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Join the Library for an unforgettable evening of cinematic immersion. Step into the screen and become part of the action as we watch the 1993 movie that follows a group of visitors trapped in a park where cloned prehistoric creatures break loose, turning a showcase of science into a fight for survival. Everything will be provided, including refreshments. No registration required. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story.” For more information or for a complete list of summer reading events, please call (419) 447-3751 or log onto http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Film Fusion: Adult Interactive Movie Night on Jun 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Film and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Foot Long Fundraiser - 06/18/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/18/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 182 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Foot long hot dog, chips, cookie and bottle of water for $7.00. Place orders by June 11th at 419-447-3141 or Kellie.Hartsel@stfrancishome.org. Pick up on June 18th from 11am - 1pm.
item.dc:creator: St. Francis Senior Ministries
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Foot Long Fundraiser on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include foot long hot dog and fundraiser.

item.title: Foot Long Fundraiser - 06/18/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/18/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 182 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Foot long hot dog, chips, cookie and bottle of water for $7.00. Place orders by June 11th at 419-447-3141 or Kellie.Hartsel@stfrancishome.org. Pick up on June 18th from 11am - 1pm.
item.dc:creator: St. Francis Senior Ministries
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Foot Long Fundraiser on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community support and fundraiser.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/18/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 47 Clay St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657
item.dc:creator: Simply Shop Local
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include wild goose chase and Seasonal & Holiday.

Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer fun.

item.title: Escape Dino Park - 06/18/2026 3:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library's Youth Services Department for "Escape Dino Park" on Thursday, June 18, from 3:00 to 6:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Something has gone awry at the dinosaur park—power is down, gates are locked, and dinosaurs are on the move! Kids in first through fifth grade are invited to drop in anytime to collaborate on solving puzzles, following dinosaur tracks, cracking secret codes, and navigating the park map to escape before time runs out. This exciting event is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more details, visit the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or go to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Escape Dino Park on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer reading program and tiffin seneca public library.

item.title: Ribbon Cutting | The Love Lock Structure in Downtown Tiffin - 06/18/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 133 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Seneca Regional Chamber & Development Ambassadors and Downtown Tiffin are excited to invite the community to a special ribbon cutting ceremony celebrating the installation of the new Love Lock structure located at the East Green at National Corner adjacent to the Splash Pad. The event will take place on Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 4 PM and is open to the public. The Love Lock structure was created through the efforts of the Downtown Tiffin Design Committee as part of Downtown Tiffin’s ongoing beautification initiatives, including the Best Foot Forward Program and the Golden Broom Award. These programs encourage businesses and property owners to maintain attractive storefronts and contribute to the overall appearance and vibrancy of the downtown district. The Design Committee also helps organize Downtown Clean Ups and other aesthetic improvement efforts throughout the community. Inspired by the Pont des Arts Love Lock Bridge in Paris, France, as well as similar installations found in Main Street communities across the country, the Downtown Tiffin Love Lock structure gives couples an opportunity to symbolize their love by attaching a lock to the structure and tossing the key into a designated key box attached nearby. The structure was generously donated by Price Manufacturing and will serve as a unique new attraction and photo opportunity in Downtown Tiffin, featuring the East Tower as a scenic backdrop. Located near the amphitheater, the East Green has become a gathering place for couples and families attending concerts and community events. It also holds special meaning as the location where couples were married during the memorable 2024 Total Eclipse celebration. Community members are encouraged to attend the ribbon cutting, celebrate this new addition to Downtown Tiffin, and learn more about how Downtown Tiffin continues to create welcoming and memorable public spaces for residents and visitors alike.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ribbon Cutting | The Love Lock Structure in Downtown Tiffin on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include love lock structure and History & Museums.

item.title: Chill Out in Downtown Tiffin - Third Thursday - 06/18/2026 5:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Trade the heatwaves for water waves! Join us on June 18, 2026 for Chill Out in Downtown Tiffin, a community-wide celebration designed to help you beat the June heat. We’re transforming our historic downtown into a refreshing summer oasis filled with splashing water, icy treats, and frosty fun for all ages. Whether you’re looking to get soaked or just want to stay chill in the shade, there’s something for everyone!
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Chill Out in Downtown Tiffin - Third Thursday on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Festivals/Fairs and community celebration.

item.title: TU Comes to You: New York City - 06/18/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join fellow Dragons in the Big Apple for a unique TU Comes to You experience at Great Jones Distilling Co. in New York City. For $75 per person, this exclusive evening will feature a private Bourbon & Bites Tour, where alumni and friends will enjoy a guided tour of the distillery along with curated bourbon samplings thoughtfully paired with small bites. Reconnect with fellow alumni and friends while experiencing one of Manhattan’s premier craft distilleries. Whether you’re a bourbon enthusiast, traveling to NYC for vacation or simply looking for a fun night out with the TU community, this is an event you won’t want to miss. Space will be limited, so be sure to register early to secure your spot. We also have a Room Block at the Moxy SoHo – reach out to Andrea at gibsonaj@tiffin.edu for more details! Date: June 18, 2026 Time: 6:00 – 8:00 p.m. Location: Great Jones Distilling Co. 686 Broadway New York, NY 10012 Register at http://tiffin.edu/advancement/alumni/events/tu-comes-to-you-new-york-city/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University Alumni & Friends
item.yodel:media_alt_text: TU Comes to You: New York City on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Clubs and bourbon tour.

item.title: "Cigar Box Art" Displayed from June 3-20, 2026 Artist Recep. June 18th, 6pm - 06/18/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin Art Guild proudly presents our second Cigar Box Show, a creative exhibit that invites artists to transform humble cigar boxes into imaginative works of art. Think outside the box—literally—and reimagine these small wooden forms as sculptures, dioramas, shadowboxes, or anything your creativity can dream up. This is your chance to turn something ordinary into something unforgettable. To help spark your ideas, our sponsor The Social Cigar, Downtown has a limited supply of empty cigar boxes available to TAG exhibit entrants at great prices, some as low as $1 each. Supplies are limited, so stop by The Social Cigar at 92 S. Washington Street in downtown Tiffin. (Limit of three boxes per entrant while supplies last.) Submit your creation and be part of a show thatÕs sure to surprise and inspire our community. Let your imagination run wild and help us fill the gallery with bold, one-of -a-kind works of art!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Cigar Box Art" Displayed from June 3-20, 2026 Artist Recep. June 18th, 6pm on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include artist and cigar box art.

item.title: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) - 06/18/2026 7:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is our concert series, free to the public. Come out and have your ears blessed, and put a smile on that face on Thursdays! Can't wait to see you!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Parks & Recreation
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Parks & Rec and concert series.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/19/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/19/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 107 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657
item.dc:creator: Steinmetz Signs & Graphic Ink (SSG Ink - Shortened)

item.title: Breakfast at JAM’s Markets SATURDAYS 9-2pm - 06/20/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/20/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy from scratch made breakfast and lunch items featuring buzzworthy sourdough artisan breads
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Breakfast at JAM’s Markets SATURDAYS 9-2pm on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Markets.

item.title: 2nd Annual Heavenly Pizza Gives Back Cruisin' into Summer Jeep and Car Show - 06/20/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/20/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 69 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the second annual Heavenly Pizza Gives Back car show and fundraiser on Saturday, June 20th, from 9am to 1pm. Free admission for spectators $15 registration per show vehicle Awards given for multiple categories One free slice of pizza per person 50/50 door prize drawing Various raffles Purchase tickets for an opportunity to win: 1 free 14" 1-item pizza per week for one year 1 free 1-item jumbo per month for one year Bring your classic, custom or offroad vehicle. This is a fundraiser for the soon-to-be built Heavenly Park. Register your vehicle at: https://tinyurl.com/HeavenlyGivesBackCarShow26
item.dc:creator: Heavenly Pizza-Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2nd Annual Heavenly Pizza Gives Back Cruisin' into Summer Jeep and Car Show on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include raffles and seasonal.

item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Chocolate covered strawberry cups are returning! $5 each until sold old! Come see us every Saturday during the farmers market! 70 s Washington. St Tiffin Ohio 44883

item.title: Tiffin Moose All You Care to Eat Breakfast Buffet - 06/20/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/20/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1146 OH-53, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Saturday June 20th: Is our MONTHLY All You Care to Eat Breakfast Buffet. Spread the word ! $10 adults. $5 ages 6-10. Ages 5 and below, Free.
item.dc:creator: The Tiffin Moose - Lodge 846
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin Moose All You Care to Eat Breakfast Buffet on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include ages 6-10 and breakfast buffet.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/20/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer fun and tiffin wild goose chase.

item.title: 2026 VetFest - 06/20/2026 3:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 167 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Another year of bringing Veterans and Community together through music and fun! This years event will feature multiple bands and food as normal. We are working diligently to make this event better than the last. This feed and outline will be updated as we move forward.
item.dc:creator: Dress, Right, Dress
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 VetFest on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Causes and bands.
